name: Kumquat Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone, cut in half, and skin the chicken breasts.
- Note: It will take about 20 kumquats to make 1 1/2 cups.
2. Combine cheese and 1/2 tsp tarragon; set aside.
3. Flatten chicken to 1/4 inch thickness. Spread cheese mixture evenly on each piece of chicken. Roll up, tuck in the sides, and pick.
4. In a small bowl, combine egg and 2 tbsp water. Stir.
5. Combine breadcrumbs and wheat germ in a shallow dish.
6. Dip each roll in egg white mix, then dredge in bread crumb mixture.
7. Place in a 12x8x2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
8. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes. Set aside; keep warm.
9. In a saucepan, combine orange juice, sugar, and garlic. Boil until reduced to 1 cup.
10. Combine 2 tbsp water and cornstarch in a small bowl. Stir.
11. Add the mixture to the orange juice mix, stirring. Then add vinegar, liqueur, and kumquats. Simmer for 5 minutes or until kumquats are tender, stirring constantly. Discard garlic.
12. Remove from heat and serve with sauce. Garnish with additional kumquats.
